description_long: This is a classic wooden armchair with a light gray finish and a vintage French-inspired design. The chair features a high, curved backrest and a seat, both of which are constructed with a woven cane pattern that provides breathability and visual texture. The armrests are elegantly curved, matching the ornate contours of the backrest and the cabriole-style legs. Subtle carved floral motifs adorn the top of the backrest and the front apron, adding a decorative touch. The overall structure appears sturdy, with a crossbar connecting the legs for additional support. This chair would be suitable for stylish urban patios, sidewalk cafes, or indoor waiting areas.
description: A vintage-style wooden armchair with a light gray finish, woven cane seat and backrest, and ornate carved details.
description_view_0: Front view showing the curved backrest, woven cane seat, and decorative floral carvings.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the curved armrest, cabriole leg, and the depth of the seat.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full woven cane backrest and the elegant frame contours.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, emphasizing the armrest curve and leg design.
